problem id: bef8b5ec
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(7) XOR SHR(3)) AND ROT(2)

examples:
  00110111 -> 10000100
  00001101 -> 00000000
  10011111 -> 00010010
  11000000 -> 00000000
  11001011 -> 00001001
  01100101 -> 10000100
  00100110 -> 00000000
  01111100 -> 00000001
  00110100 -> 00000000

query: 10011010
predicted answer: 00000010
